tooltip.radweaponry.hummingbirdfan.name: [Gust]
tooltip.radweaponry.hummingbirdfan.desc:
• Attacks inflict Gust for %s seconds, stacking up to Gust%s
 • Gust lifts the target periodically.
 • Critical hits apply %s stacks
 ‣ Right-Click to launch nearby mobs with Gust upwards and away, dealing %s magic damage per stack and applying the Chromatic effect (Cooldown: %ss)
 ‣ Sneak Right-Click to launch yourself (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.hummingbirdfan.desc2:
• Apply an on-hit effect based on color
 • Blue: Slowness%s for %ss
 • Orange: Weakness%s for %ss
 • Pink: Levitation for %ss
 • Purple: Poison%s for %ss
 • Red: Ignite for %ss
 • Snow: Slowness%s for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.name: [Hydra Poison]
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.desc:
• Critical hits inflict Poison for %s seconds, stacking up to Poison%s (max %ss total)
 • Attacks deal %s more damage per stack of Poison on target
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.desc2:
• Grants immunity to Poison
 • Poison applied to you is converted to Regeneration
tooltip.radweaponry.hydra_scythe.desc3: • Right-Click to toss a Splash Potion of Poison (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.halbird.name: [Clucky Strike]
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.name: [Divine Blessing]
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.desc: • Grants Absorption%s to allies and Absorption%s to you when thrown at them
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.desc2: • Thrown spear is not consumed, pierces infinitely, and applies Glowing
tooltip.radweaponry.holy_spear.desc3: • Deal %sx damage to Undead; compatible with Smite
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.name: [Lethal Incision]
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.desc: • Right-Click to hurl a venom-coated blade, inflicting Poison%s and creating a lingering Poison%s cloud (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.scorpion_blade.desc4: • Combine with a Poison Potion in an Anvil to temporarily amplify Way of the Spider
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.name: [Life Siphon]
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc.vanill:
• Absorbs life from mobs you kill, storing up to %s essence, which give %s max health each
 • Mending doubles capacity
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc.radenc:
• Absorbs life from mobs you kill, storing up to %s essence which give %s max health each
 • Mending doubles capacity
 • Life Leech gives a %s chance per level for an additional charge
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc2: • Press [%s] to consume stored essence, restoring health and granting Regeneration and Saturation
tooltip.radweaponry.hemovial.desc3: • If you would die with full essence, consume all charges to survive instead (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.name: [Moon Blade]
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.desc2: • After %s hits, attack all nearby mobs and gain Strength%s and Speed%s (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.desc3.vanil: • Nighttime grants %sx increased healing and Speed%s
tooltip.radweaponry.starhawk.desc3.ars: • Nighttime grants %sx increased healing and Mana Regeneration%s
tooltip.radweaponry.cinderstorm.name: [Needle Fury]
tooltip.radweaponry.cinderstorm.desc: • Instantly shoots arrows (Cooldown: %ss, affected by Quick Charge)
tooltip.radweaponry.cinderstorm.desc2: • Shoots flaming arrows that inflict Slowness%s for %s seconds and explode in a small area
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.name: [Extending]
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.desc:
• Each consecutive attack temporarily extends the pole, increasing Attack Reach
 • Sneak Right-Click or deselect to retract
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.desc2: • Gains Attack Speed as it extends
tooltip.radweaponry.power_pole.desc3: • High durability and %s chance to ignore durability loss
tooltip.radweaponry.pitcher_canteen.name: [Potion Storage]
tooltip.radweaponry.pitcher_canteen.desc: • Place similar potions into this to store the effects and drink them later
• Pour into a filled cauldron to empty
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.name: [Exploit Weakness]
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.desc: • Increases damage dealt to mobs based on how many times you've killed them
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.desc2: • Reduces damage taken from mobs based on how many times you've killed them
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.desc3: • Grants a chance for increased Looting for mobs based on how many times you've killed them
tooltip.radweaponry.bestiary_charm.vanil: Keep in inventory to receive bonuses
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.name: [Rekindling]
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc.1: • Killing ignited mobs grants up to %s charges; Fire Protection increases the max capacity by %s per level
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc.4: • %s charges: You are constantly on fire
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc2: • Press [%s] with max charges to expend all charges, blasting nearby enemies with a burst of fire that deals %s damage per charge (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc3: • Every %ss: blasts up to %s nearby mobs for %s damage; Flame increases max targets by %s and damage by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.1: • Increases damage to burning targets by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.2: • Fire Aspect increases this bonus by %s per level
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.3: • While on fire, this bonus is multiplied by %sx
tooltip.radweaponry.orb_fire.desc4.ars: • Also increases Fire spell damage by %sx
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.name: [Piercing]
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc.1: • Deals %s bonus damage per point of Armor the target has
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc.2: • Deals %s bonus damage per point of Armor Toughness the target has
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc2.1: • If offhand is empty, %s damage, %s attack speed
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc2.2: • If offhand is not empty, %s damage, %s attack speed
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc3: • During day, gain Strength%s and Fire Resistance
tooltip.radweaponry.soluna_blade.desc4: • During night, gain Speed%s and Night Vision
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.name: [Tempo Release]
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.1: • Fires at full speed when minimum charge is reached
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.2: • Plays a note on release corresponding to how long it was drawn
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.3: • Low notes deal %sx damage, mid notes deal %sx damage, high notes deal %sx damage
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc.4: • Quick Charge decreases time needed to reach higher notes
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc2: • Combine with tunable note block sound modifiers in an Anvil to change the instrument played
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.1: • Stores the last 3 notes played to form a melody, times out in %s seconds
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.2: • Completing a melody replays the sequence and triggers an effect
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.3: ♫ Crescendo (LMH): Strength%s & Haste%s to party for %s seconds (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.4: ♫ Decrescendo (HML): Slowness%s & Weakness%s to nearby mobs (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.5: ♫ Harmony (MLH): Heals party for %s of their max health and grants Regeneration%s for %s seconds (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.6: ♫ Discordance (MHL): Disorient & knockback nearby mobs for %s seconds (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.8: ♫ Legato (LML): Grants Resistance%s to party for %s seconds (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.9: ♫ Cadence (HHL): Deals %s magic damage to nearby mobs in %s pulses (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.rhythmweaver.desc3.1: ♫ Resonance (MHM): Repeats last melody and empowers it (Cooldown x%s)
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.name: [Bloodletting]
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc: • Consumes 2% of health to fire empowered blood arrows
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc2: • Overcharging consumes extra health to increase arrow base damage
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc3.1: • Arrows refund 50% of their cost on hit, 100% on kill
tooltip.radweaponry.heartstring.desc3.2: • Arrows deal 1% of targets health as bonus damage
tooltip.radweaponry.lightning_hammer.des: • Critical hits apply Slowness%s for %s seconds
• Critical hits cause a lightning strike to occur after %ss, dealing %s of the attack's damage (Cooldown: %ss)
• During a thunderstorm, this attack strikes an additional time
• After killing a mob, deal %s of its max health as damage to nearby mobs after %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.name: [Gunblade]
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.1: • Can be used to automatically shoot hitscan bullets
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.2: • Possesses a capacity of %s energy bullets
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.3: • After using all ammo, reloads for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc.4: • Reloads automatically after not firing for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc2.1: • Reduced movement speed penalty while using
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc2.2: • Melee attacks grant Speed%s and Jump Boost%s for %s seconds
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc2.3: • Ranged attacks grant Strength%s and Haste%s for %s seconds
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc3.3: • Channeling increases ranged attack speed by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.gunblade.desc3.5: • Quick Charge decreases auto-reload delay by %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.name: [Phasing]
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc.1: • Press [%s] to phase through the void, granting increased mobility and decreased attack power
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc.2: • Grants Weakness X, Invisibility, Resistance V, Jump Boost V, and Speed III for %s seconds (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc2.1: • Locking eyes with a target grants you Blindness, Speed%s, and Strength%s for %ss, and gives the target Glowing and Slowness%s (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc2.2: • Barehanded attacks deal %sx damage to target during Abyssal Gaze
tooltip.radweaponry.void_core.desc3: • When falling into the void, gain Elytra Flight and Regeneration X
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.name: [Resolve's Edge]
• Defeating a boss with this weapon increases its damage
• Completing quests increases this swords damage
• Completing chapters increases this swords damage
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.desc2: • Sneak Right-Click to create a temporary marker at the target location you can teleport back to within %s (Cooldown: %s)
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.desc3: • %s chance for %sx experience drops when defeating mobs
tooltip.radweaponry.questing_sword.desc4: • Automatically adds waypoints to visited structures
tooltip.radweaponry.viper_amulet.name: [Poison Accelerant]
tooltip.radweaponry.viper_amulet.desc: • Increases poison damage nearby mobs receive
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Brute's Rebuke]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • After blocking a melee attack, your next attack within %ss deals %sx damage
• If the item is loved by piglins or repairs with gold, deals an additional %sx damage
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Deflector]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • Blocking a projectile redirects it to where you are looking
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Battle Bracer]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • No movement speed penalty while blocking
• Any blocked attack will breach the shield, putting it on cooldown
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.name: [Golden Bastion]
tooltip.radweaponry.gilded_armguard.desc: • Increases armor toughness by %s when worn
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.name: [Momentum Strike]
• Attacking grants up to %s momentum stacks, which increase Attack Speed by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.desc2: • Holding use assumes a defensive stance, deflecting projectiles and blocking attacks
• Reduced movement speed penalty while defending
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.desc3: • Releasing use while aiming at an entity triggers a swift dash attack (Cooldown: %ss)
• You are immune to damage for %ss after activating
• Deals damage equal to %s sword strikes
tooltip.radweaponry.revenants_edge.desc4: • Quick Charge increases maximum Momentum stacks by %s
• Multishot increases Unending Hatred strike count by %s
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.name: [Devouring]
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc.1: • Blocking an attack causes the shield to bite the attacker, dealing damage that scales with your health, armor, and armor toughness (Cooldown: %ss)
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc.2: • Defeating a mob with this attack grants you Saturation for 2s and Strength%s for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc2.1: • Each in-game day the shield craves a new mob
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc2.2: • Devouring desired mobs grants Saturation for 5s, Regeneration%s and Resistance%s for %ss
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc2.3: • Feeding the shield desired mobs permanently strengthens it
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc3.1: • If the shield has been fed today, Devouring attacks will deal %sx damage
• If the shield has been fed today, Devouring attacks will deal %sx damage, Gluttony increases this bonus
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc3.2: • Can be repaired by feeding it food items by Right-Clicking an item onto it
• Can be repaired by feeding it food items by Right-Clicking an item onto it, Curse of Appetite increases repair amount
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc4.2: • Increases armor by %s and armor toughness by %s when held, increased with Spice of Life
tooltip.radweaponry.ravenous_maw.desc4.3: • You are unable to move while blocking
